title: Delicate Roasted Middle Eastern Manchego Tagine
description: A cozy and flavorful Middle Eastern dish featuring roasted Manchego cheese, served in an agave leaf vessel with a glassy jelly texture, perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Rinse the agave leaves and pat them dry with a paper towel.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, honey, sumac, and lemon juice.
Place a large agave leaf in a baking dish and brush the oil mixture onto the leaf.
Crumble the Manchego cheese onto the center of the agave leaf.
Fold the agave leaf over the cheese to form a packet.
Roast the packet in the oven for 20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the leaf is caramelized.
While the cheese is roasting, steam the pomegranate seeds and parsley in a steamer basket until tender.
Remove the packet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the roasted Manchego cheese in the agave leaf vessel, topped with steamed pomegranate seeds and parsley, and drizzled with the remaining oil mixture.
